title: poikilogyne neglecta
intro: Poikilogyne neglecta is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Poikilogyne neglecta include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in water or oil, and it can also be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
